response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node, D, C/C++, Java) and has shipped at scale (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby millions of requests/sec). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing, telemetry frameworks, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal IC6 role. His leadership is shown via workshops/talks and founding a project, but there's limited evidence of leading multi-team, cross-org engineering initiatives at enterprise scale. Worth a screening conversation to probe growth/experimentation depth, but he reads more like a Senior/Staff full-stack engineer than a Principal growth-systems architect.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background (JS/TS, C/C++, Java, D) and 15+ years of production experience
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/sec)
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, courses, founding GISCollective, and TDD/CI/CD advocacy
concerns: No explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flighting, or rollout-risk controls
Limited evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical/experimental analysis depth
Scope of leadership appears team-level rather than multi-team, cross-product Principal/IC6 influence

key_factors.factor: Deep polyglot engineering and high-scale systems background
Limited evidence of Principal-level cross-org leadership
